ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the task was created or is due */,
  "task_type" INTEGER /* Type of task (e.g., meeting, deadline, project) */,
  "is_finished" INTEGER /* Status of the task (yes/no) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the task */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the task (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the task */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the task */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the task was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the task */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the task was last modified */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the task belongs */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team to which the task is assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_task_type FOREIGN KEY ("task_type") REFERENCES task_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the task type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the task type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, team lead, team member) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team to which the user belongs */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "task_id" TEXT /* ID of the task being assigned */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being assigned the task */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the task was assigned */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "task_id" TEXT /* ID of the task being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was added */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "task_id" TEXT /* ID of the task being updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the task (e.g., in progress, completed, pending) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_status_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_status_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reminder */,
  "task_id" TEXT /* ID of the task being reminded */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date the reminder is set for */,
  "reminder_time" TEXT /* Time the reminder is set for */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the reminder */,
  "is_sent" INTEGER /* Indicates if the reminder has been sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reminders_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reminders_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calendar_integration" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "task_id" TEXT /* ID of the task being integrated */,
  "calendar_id" TEXT /* ID of the calendar being integrated with */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date the integration was set up */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the integration */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the integration is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calendar_integration_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calendar_integration_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics */,
  "analytics_name" TEXT /* Name of the analytics */,
  "analytics_date" TEXT /* Date the analytics were generated */,
  "analytics_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the analytics */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the analytics */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the analytics is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
